analysis_result: 33 samples are located in the Cutaneous region.
denominator_used: N = 108; all samples in the 'Clinical Data' sheet of 41467_2023_38432_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx with non-null Tumor_ID.
assumptions_made: Filtered to rows with non-null Tumor_ID per data notes; exact string match on Location == 'Cutaneous' (case-sensitive).
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - File: 41467_2023_38432_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx, sheet 'Clinical Data'
   - Shape: 108 rows x 15 columns
   - Relevant columns: Tumor_ID, Location

B. COHORT DEFINITION
   - Filter: Tumor_ID non-null -> 108 samples (no rows dropped)
   - Final analytic cohort: N = 108

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Location value_counts: Peripheral=46, Cutaneous=33, Spinal=29
   - No NaN values present in Location column

D. COMPUTATION
   - Counted rows where Location == 'Cutaneous' (exact string match)
   - Numerator: samples with Location == 'Cutaneous'
   - Denominator: 108 total samples with non-null Tumor_ID

E. RESULT
   - Number of Cutaneous samples: 33 (30.6% of 108)

F. CAVEATS
   - Exact string matching is case-sensitive; all entries found use title-case 'Cutaneous' with no extra whitespace issues
   - No missing values in the Location column, so denominator = full cohort
